TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Ciyakang ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Banrong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 451 buwan, 1,350 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 1,307 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 43 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku88%, Amis 2%, Tayan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciyakang hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Ciyakang hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Ciyakang hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Ciyakang hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ciyakang hya' ga Gbayang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨijakaŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βanroŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku**%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨijakaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨijakaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨijakaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨijakaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨijakaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ɣβajaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Ciyakang ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Banrong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 451 buwan, 1,350 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 1,307 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 43 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku88%, Amis 2%, Tayan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciyakang hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Ciyakang hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Ciyakang hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Ciyakang hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ciyakang hya' ga Gbayang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨijakaŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βanroŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku**%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨijakaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨijakaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨijakaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨijakaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨijakaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ɣβajaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
